# Memory Bandwidth, Quantization, and Numerics

Many inference optimizations are memory optimizations wearing a model name.

## Chapter Job

Explain how precision and quantization change memory, speed, quality, and
hardware compatibility.

## Topics

- BF16, FP16, FP8, INT8, INT4, and mixed precision.
- Weight-only quantization.
- Activation quantization.
- KV cache quantization.
- Calibration.
- Quality evaluation.
- Bandwidth versus compute bottlenecks.
- Quantization support across runtimes and hardware.

## Discipline

No quantization claim is complete without:

- Model.
- Dataset or task.
- Hardware.
- Runtime.
- Precision format.
- Latency and throughput result.
- Quality regression result.
